user_query:
Please read input/reading_insights.json and batch-generate reviews and related concepts as follows:

1) Reviews
- For each object in the JSON array (fields: id, title, insight, depth), generate a Markdown review using our standard local template at the specified depth.
- brief: include the security note line, a "Brief Review" section with an "Insight" line that contains the exact insight text; omit any "Suggested Connections" section.
- detailed: include the security note line, a "Detailed Book Review" section with an "Original Insight" block containing the exact insight text; include a "Suggested Connections" section with exactly these three bullets, in this order:
  - Relates to principles of active learning and knowledge retention
  - Connects to frameworks for personal and professional development
  - Could be integrated with goal-setting and progress tracking practices
- comprehensive: include the security note line, a "Comprehensive Review & Analysis" section with a "Core Insight" block containing the exact insight text; include both "Learning Pathways" and "Reflection Prompts" sections; also include the same "Suggested Connections" section as detailed (the exact three bullets in the same order).
- Write each file to output/reviews/<id>-<depth>.md (e.g., output/reviews/bk001-detailed.md). Ensure the exact insight text from input appears in the appropriate section.

2) Related concepts
- Create output/related_concepts.json mapping each id to an array of related concept suggestions (strings only; no explanations). Use exactly 4 suggestions for detailed entries, 3 for brief entries, and 5 for comprehensive entries.

Create any needed folders under output/ before writing files.
